allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\nodejs\\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Test-Path "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\node.exe")
PowerShell($py = \(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; if \($py\) { & $py --version } else { Write-Host "python not found" })

PowerShell($job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-Location "c:\\Users\\lucas\\Documents\\EloGroup\\2026\\01_prototipo_assiste"; python -m http.server 3000 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Write-Host "Server job started, ID: $\($job.Id\)")
PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference = 'SilentlyContinue'; $jobs = Get-Job; Write-Host "Jobs: $\($jobs.Count\)"; foreach \($j in $jobs\) { Write-Host "$\($j.Id\) $\($j.State\)" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Server OK - Status $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "Still not reachable: $_" })
PowerShell(python -c "from selenium import webdriver; print\('selenium available'\)" 2>$null)

PowerShell(python -c "from selenium import webdriver; from selenium.webdriver.chrome.options import Options; opts = Options\(\); opts.add_argument\('--headless'\); opts.add_argument\('--window-size=1440,900'\); driver = webdriver.Chrome\(options=opts\); driver.get\('http://localhost:3000'\); driver.save_screenshot\('c:/Users/lucas/Documents/EloGroup/2026/01_prototipo_assiste/temporary screenshots/screenshot-1.png'\); driver.quit\(\); print\('Done'\)")
